title: Asset Tools
subtitle: crop, alpha, conversion, source sheets
description: Concrete utilities for asset work: source-sheet checks, crop planning, alpha/cutout cleanup, conversion, texture checks, manual local prep UI, and step-local verification outputs.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Asset Tools contract: what asset tools own, what they do not own, and the current source-sheet, crop, cutout, review-atlas, and texture groups.

children.title: Video Tools
children.description: Groups video generation, frame extraction, matte preparation, and sheet workflows.

children.title: Tools Library
children.subtitle: shared python helpers
children.description: Low-level Python helpers shared by asset asset tools. Not a public workflow surface.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Tools Library contract: small shared helpers for tools tools only.

children.title: atomic_io.py
children.description: Atomic text, JSON, file-copy, and image-save helpers used by Python asset tools tools.

children.title: Image Tools
children.subtitle: media-type umbrella: sourcing, bg, regions, slice, alpha, route
children.description: Groups 2D image workflow tools.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Image Tools umbrella contract: per-tool decomposition, the studio Python venv, and the shared _bridge.

children.title: _bridge
children.description: Groups shared image tool plumbing.

children.title: alpha_matte
children.description: Single-background known-key cutout (path 1) for opaque art and flat-key holes: key_matte.py plus the chroma_key_alpha.py keying primitive and their tests.

children.title: alpha_dualplate
children.description: Fractional alpha (glow, glass, soft shadow) from an aligned white/black plate pair (path 2): dual_plate_alpha.py Smith & Blinn projection plus the pair-consistency gate and tests.

children.title: route
children.description: Chooses key-matte vs dual-plate for a flat-key source crop from soft-alpha risk metrics before a generation is spent.

children.title: bg_fix
children.description: Border-connected background chroma normalization: snap the source's border-connected background to the key colour without changing interior key-coloured art.

children.title: regions
children.description: Region detection over a normalized source: find component rects, merge fragments, pad, and write a regions manifest plus an overlay.

children.title: slice
children.description: Slice a source by reviewed regions, apply per-region alpha (key-matte by default; no silent fallback), optionally polygon-mask, and write PNGs, a manifest, a review sheet, and a ZIP.

children.title: sources
children.description: Source-image upload conventions for the image tools: where draft/generated images live before they become accepted assets.

children.title: Conversion Tools
children.subtitle: format conversion
children.description: Conversion utilities that normalize source assets into inspectable or importable formats.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Conversion Tools contract: file conversion without license, storage, or runtime-loading decisions.

children.title: obj_to_glb.py
children.description: Blender headless OBJ/MTL to GLB converter with split-by-material output for engine-friendly meshes.

children.title: Source Sheet Tools
children.subtitle: chroma and component audit
children.description: Tools for generated UI/icon/sprite/decor source sheets: normalize border-connected chroma background and audit component count, gutters, borders, and key-color conflicts before cropping.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Source Sheet Tools command guide for normalize_chroma.py and audit_intake.py.

children.title: normalize_chroma.py
children.description: Normalizes border-connected chroma background pixels in generated source sheets without changing interior key-colored art.

children.title: audit_intake.py
children.description: Audits a source sheet for component separation, unsafe borders/gutters, and key-color conflicts before crop planning.

children.title: source_sheets/tests
children.description: Verifies source sheet tools contracts.

children.title: Crop Tools
children.subtitle: source-sheet split plans
children.description: Tools for splitting source sheets into named asset regions and future manual crop-boundary editing.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Crop Tools contract: crop plans and future boundary-editing ownership.

children.title: plan_prepared_crops_from_intake.py
children.description: Creates named crop-plan entries from a passing source-sheet intake audit.

children.title: plan_prepared_crops_from_intake_test.py
children.description: Verifies crop tools contracts.

children.title: Review Atlas
children.subtitle: visual contact sheets
children.description: Tools for building and auditing visual contact sheets used for source review. This is not engine integration output.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Review Atlas contract: visual contact sheets for inspection, not engine integration output.

children.title: build_review_atlas.py
children.description: Builds a labeled review atlas/contact sheet for prepared UI, icon, or sprite outputs.

children.title: audit_review_atlas.py
children.description: Audits review-atlas layout, labels, and source coverage.

children.title: Texture Tools
children.subtitle: tile preview and seam metrics
children.description: Tools for standalone material textures: generate 2x2 repeat previews and measure obvious edge mismatches before accepting a texture as tileable.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Texture Tools command guide for tileable texture seam audits and preview generation.

children.title: audit_tileable_texture.py
children.description: Writes a 2x2 texture preview and reports mean/max edge deltas for repeat-texture candidates.

children.title: audit_tileable_texture.test.py
children.description: Verifies texture tools contracts.
